integrity_verification.verification_method: Hash comparison before and after analysis

methodology.results: Evidence image created with write blocker

methodology.description: Entropy analysis for hidden volume detection
Wipe pattern detection in unallocated space
methodology.results: Analyzed unallocated space for anti-forensic indicators
Extracted email, URL, and other artifacts

artifact_findings.interpretation: This region shows anomalous entropy characteristics (0.68) which may indicate encrypted content, compressed data, or a hidden volume.

anti_forensic_findings.evidence: Found 126 high-entropy blocks with mean entropy 7.8174
anti_forensic_findings.interpretation: High entropy regions may indicate encrypted volumes, compressed data, or hidden partitions.

ml_results.explanation: Used zscore to detect statistical anomalies in disk sectors

limitations: Cannot determine purpose of high-entropy regions with certainty
Cannot prove number of overwrite passes used
Cannot detect all secure deletion tools
Requires unallocated space to be present

conclusion.summary: Forensic analysis of the evidence media has been completed using industry-standard tools and methodologies. The findings are based on statistical analysis of entropy patterns, forensic artifact extraction, and wipe pattern detection.
conclusion.findings_summary: Analysis identified 18 suspicious regions, 18 artifact findings, and 1 anti-forensic indicators. The overall anomaly score is 126 anomalous blocks out of 7604 total (1.66%).
recommendations: Review identified high-entropy regions for potential encrypted volumes
Consider using specialized tools (e.g., VeraCrypt, TrueCrypt) to attempt volume decryption
Analyze recovered artifacts for relevant evidence

declaration.declaration_text: I declare that the analysis was conducted according to industry standards and best practices. The findings presented in this report are a true and accurate representation of the evidence examined. I have not altered, fabricated, or misrepresented any data during this analysis.
